evidence: "Hilarious, amusing and with a lot of heart."
"Although the dialogue is great, at times it felt overly complicated & exaggerated."
"Characters were cookie cutter, nothing unique or 3 dimensional."
"Pacing is excellent -- scenes segue really well."
"Acting is amazing, storyline relatable but a bit mundane."
"I am a big fan of Woody Allen and this is one of his finest films."
"Such a timely premise, and unexpected character/story twists."
"Scary and bizarre in a strangely simplistic premise."
"Brings back great memories of living in New York City."

additional_patterns.name: character_development
evidence: "Wished chemistry between two leads was more believable."
"The story had a lot of holes, it was formulaic and I didn't connect with any characters."

summary: The user enjoys dramedies and comedies with fast pacing and high production quality, particularly valuing strong performances. They have a fondness for Woody Allen's work and appreciate emotional engagement in storytelling, though they express mixed feelings about narrative complexity and character development.
